user.title: Tinder MCP — Sign In
user.description: Enter the MCP server URL and your Tinder phone number to receive an SMS code.

otp.title: Tinder MCP — SMS Confirmation
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent by SMS to **{phone_number}**.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the MCP server. Make sure the add-on is running.
error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Use international format (+1...).
error.invalid_otp: Invalid or expired OTP code. Please start over.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your phone number and try again.
error.timeout: MCP server timed out. Check the add-on logs.
